Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A thin stream of dark chocolate pours onto a textured, square oat bar in the foreground, increasing coverage with zig-zag lines across the golden-brown surface. Similar bars with existing toppings rest on a wooden board near a white bowl. [2-4] A hand reaches in from above, releasing small golden-brown crumbs onto the central bar over the wet chocolate drizzle. [4-6] The hand returns to grasp the central oat bar, fingers positioning on either side of the treat covered in chocolate and crumbs. [6-8] Large, capitalized white text reading "BUTTERFINGER RICE KRISPIE TREATS" appears centered as hands lift the prepared bar, displaying the topping while background elements remain partially obscured.

Inside a grey pot, a wooden spoon stirs a smooth, glossy tan liquid, creating circular ripples. White cylindrical marshmallows are dropped into the mixture, accompanied by the centered white text "MARSHMALLOWS". A hand continues adding more marshmallows to the pot from above. The wooden spoon then vigorously stirs the white marshmallows into the melted tan base. As the spoon agitates the ingredients, the marshmallows shift position, become coated in the sticky liquid, and begin to melt and blend into the mixture.

[12-14] Inside the pot, melted butter and peanut butter form a smooth light brown liquid, stirred vigorously by a wooden spoon into a creamy texture. [24-28] White marshmallows are stirred into the tan mixture, dissolving significantly to create a thick, stringy, and cohesive sticky texture. The mixture becomes a uniform, gooey beige mass as white chunks dissolve and the substance becomes smoother. [28-30] The wooden spoon stirs the now smooth, glossy beige mixture in the silver pot, lifting to reveal its thick, viscous consistency coating the wood. [30-32] A hand pours a large quantity of light yellow puffy rice cereal from a glass container into the pot while white capital text reading "RICE KRISPIES" appears centered over the falling cereal.

recent_thinks: [8-10] The scene changes to a top-down view of a grey pot. Hands hold a small white bowl containing a creamy tan mixture over the pan while a spoon stirs it. White text 'BUTTER & PEANUT BUTTER' appears centrally. A bowl of brown crumbles is visible in the top left corner on a striped cloth.

[10-12] The text overlay vanishes. Hands tilt the small white bowl, pouring the creamy tan mixture into the grey pot where a butter square sits. A metal spoon scrapes the remaining contents from the bowl into the pan, combining ingredients.

[32-34] The pouring action continues as light yellow rice cereal fills the silver pot, accumulating over the thick beige mixture and wooden spoon. The clear glass container empties its contents, leaving the pot nearly full of the dry, puffy grains. The cereal completely covers the sticky base, creating a textured layer ready for mixing.

queries.question: Describe the key preparation steps shown in the video sequence.

answers.text: The video shows dark chocolate being drizzled in zig-zag patterns over a square oat bar. Next, a hand sprinkles golden-brown crumbs onto the wet chocolate topping. The finished bar is then grasped and lifted to display the garnished surface before a title card appears. Finally, the scene shifts to a top-down view where a creamy tan mixture of butter and peanut butter is stirred in a small bowl held over a pot.

samples.output: <think>A hand grips a wooden spoon to vigorously stir the mound of light yellow rice cereal into the thick, glossy beige mixture within the silver pot. The dry grains shift and begin coating with the sticky base as the spoon moves through the ingredients.</think><answer></answer>

queries.question: Describe the key preparation steps shown in the video sequence.

answers.text: The video shows dark chocolate being drizzled in zig-zag patterns over a square oat bar. Next, a hand sprinkles golden-brown crumbs onto the wet chocolate topping. The finished bar is then grasped and lifted to display the garnished surface before a title card appears. Finally, the scene shifts to a top-down view where a creamy tan mixture of butter and peanut butter is stirred in a small bowl held over a pot.

Following the initial stirring, the creamy peanut butter mixture is scraped into a large pot containing a square of butter. A wooden spoon then stirs these ingredients until they form a smooth, glossy tan liquid. Subsequently, light yellow rice cereal is poured from a glass container into the pot, followed by the addition of crushed light brown pieces, which are combined with the sticky cereal mixture to create the final base.

After combining the cereal and crushed pieces, the mixture is pressed into a square glass baking dish to form a compact, textured base. Once flattened, the treat is set aside to cool. The process then shifts to preparing the topping, where dark chocolate chips are poured from a metal measuring cup into a white bowl, ready for the next stage of assembly.

queries.question: Describe the key preparation steps shown in the video sequence.

answers.text: The video shows dark chocolate being drizzled in zig-zag patterns over a square oat bar. Next, a hand sprinkles golden-brown crumbs onto the wet chocolate topping. The finished bar is then grasped and lifted to display the garnished surface before a title card appears. Finally, the scene shifts to a top-down view where a creamy tan mixture of butter and peanut butter is stirred in a small bowl held over a pot.

Following the initial stirring, the creamy peanut butter mixture is scraped into a large pot containing a square of butter. A wooden spoon then stirs these ingredients until they form a smooth, glossy tan liquid. Subsequently, light yellow rice cereal is poured from a glass container into the pot, followed by the addition of crushed light brown pieces, which are combined with the sticky cereal mixture to create the final base.

After combining the cereal and crushed pieces, the mixture is pressed into a square glass baking dish to form a compact, textured base. Once flattened, the treat is set aside to cool. The process then shifts to preparing the topping, where dark chocolate chips are poured from a metal measuring cup into a white bowl, ready for the next stage of assembly.

The sequence concludes with the final assembly of the treat. Dark chocolate is poured in a thin stream over the textured oat bar in the foreground. Subsequently, a hand sprinkles golden-brown crumbs onto the wet chocolate topping. The finished bar is then grasped and lifted to display the garnished surface before the scene transitions.

answers.text: B
